eval_dimensions.name: Phase 0 Friction Gate
eval_dimensions.description: Phase 0 friction level prompt fires via AskUserQuestion before any work begins, and persists the choice for nested work-on invocations

eval_dimensions.name: Parallel Work Dispatch
eval_dimensions.description: Independent work items are dispatched to parallel agents or worktrees with proper isolation

evals.name: phase0-friction-gate
evals.description: Tests that Phase 0 friction level gate fires via AskUserQuestion before dispatching any work items.
evals.expected_output: AskUserQuestion is called with friction level options (Guided, Adaptive, Strict) before any issue processing begins. Choice is persisted to ~/.claude/Dev10x/session.yaml.

assertions.text: Phase 0 friction level prompt uses AskUserQuestion tool call, not plain text
AskUserQuestion for friction level fires before any work item dispatch
Gate presents all three friction levels: Guided, Adaptive, Strict
After user selects a level, the choice is persisted to ~/.claude/Dev10x/session.yaml via Write tool
